messages.subject: [R--gR] ggm package: update
messages.body_plain:
I have updated package ggm working together with 
Mathias Drton. The new version 0.8 is available at CRAN.  

This version contains:
- new functions for defining ancestral graphs (makeAG, unmakeAG)
- new functions for fitting ancestral graphs and covariance graphs by ML
provided by Mathias Drton (fitAncestralGraph, fitCovGraph)
- a (simple) function for drawing graphs (drawGraph).

Moreover some bugs were fixed and some fuctions
are now more efficient. 

The standard adjacency matrix representation for graphs 
has been adopted everywhere. 

Giovanni 
 
-- 
Giovanni M. Marchetti
Dipartimento di Statistica, Univ. di Firenze     Phone:  +39 055 4237 204
viale Morgagni, 59                               Fax:    +39 055 4223 560
I 50134 Firenze, Italy                           email:   gmm at ds.unifi.it
